segments.text: I wear a garland of flowers
Welcome, welcome
Welcome, welcome
Welcome
You all are welcome
All you do is welcome
I request my mother
I request my mother
We all welcome you.
Today, in the midst of us,
Shri Mataji, You are our star
We will dance and sing
We'll dance and sing
Welcome, welcome
As you see so many Sahaja Yogis coming here in the Christmas puja, Christianity has spread
all over the world and there are so many so-called Christians who say they follow Christ.
I don't know from which angle, but Christ was the embodiment of Paramchaitanya He
was Aumkara he was Shri Ganesha And those that follow Him have to be very different
people, but always happens in every religion that they go at random into the opposite direction.
Completely opposite essence of Christ life was detachment and sacrifice for a person
who is detached there's nothing like sacrifice he sees his life as just drama such a great
came on this earth and created the so-called Christian religion which has gone into wars,
all kinds of hypocritical things. And now people are discovering about it."
He stood for truth! And Christians don't know what is the Truth is? The Truth
is that you are the Spirit and we have to become the Spirit.
He's one who has talked about second birth of realization, but they've forgotten
what he said – What They Have To Achieve!
It such a funny thing all these great people came on this earth
And created a proper religion for our ascent and I don't know how people have become
so stupid with the teachings of this,so called their masters.
It's all money oriented apart from that it is not standing on truth.
I think this is the second crucifixion of these religions.
There's no religion which following really their principles as being described
–I don't know how they manage to twist that truth in his manner just
to make some money or some fuss.
Such a ritualistic stuff is going on in the name of Christ, though they have faltered
so many times and there had experience such bad influence from world reaction we don't
So why such a roundabout things come up and people accept it, they just accept.
You take any religion these days Islam is talking I don't know of what there are
two important thing in the life of Mohammed Sahaj.
The first one called as mirage which nothing but awakening of kundalini absolutely clearly
And the second one, he has talked about is jihad.
Jihad means killing your bad things –
Killing you're back nature
Killing all the Shadripus within you
It doesn't mean that to become a Muslim and kill yourself
Is stupid thing do
Did You became Muslim just to
Kill Yourself
and commit suicide, as a ritual they are saying that by this you will go to Jannat into the
heavens. How can You? As Muslims They're not religiously – Not at all! And then
By killing these sinful people, how will you go to the heavens where we'll have enjoyment
of Jnana?
There's no reasoning but all this bananas first off-all has finished their education.
Have finished your education!
They do not educate themselves at all so they are no idea in this world there are
understanding what is their position. Some few are educated but they also lost with the
idea of having power on these people, it's such a shameful thing to do in the name
God and in the names or spirituality our duty is tell them about the truth
Our duty is bring them to the proper path of spirituality because they are all lost.
Christians have been lost, Muslims and Hindus were also lost – all of these people have
no idea as what their religion professed or how it should be done but ultimately
Christ was crucified.
So you can see how when there was truth untruth tried to finish it off, they couldn't bear
him.
We have example of Socrates what is the need kill them but then killed in this way so
far we know that all people who are pivotal for the truth are being finished because
They are following some religion because they can have power over other people, religion
that there may be.
Mirage is a Kundalini awakening and this way the mirages will never take place very
good so many of you got realization we all got your vibrations and cool breeze which
He is describing to us that you should feel the cool breeze, but who can tell the Muslims?
You talk something they'll come and cut your throat.
That's all!
We will go to jihad.
It such a stupid thing their doing
And in this modern times as we see people have crossed all the mariyadas
all the things of a religion, for I went to America and was surprised how they have forgotten
about morality. They had no sense of morality! And there are selling it in market making
money out off them on contrary these Muslims especially there is class called Wahhabis
These people are saying that women are the ones who spoil your morality and so hide them.
They should be covered!
Any woman was wearing white chappals in Afghanistan, they were beating her – kill
And so many people in India, especially North have taken to Islamic culture and they really
ill-treat women of the north.
I was married with a man from the north and know how they had been unkind to women
So North is already contaminated by this and South is contaminated
by the fanatic Hindus, all kinds of rituals, worst type, bestowed upon only on women are
followed in south. They will shave head off a woman make her go round a temple pour water
on her and she is just tumbling around. She's not walking, but they go on putting water
onto Her – I've seen it myself! We have Sati of the killing of women after
their husband. This something no one can understand why put all the dharma on woman
Why not on the men?
But one thing good that Hindu religion has now become so much out of date, you can correct
all these things.
So many have been corrected in my own lifetime I was surprised how could they do it but
even Muslims and Islamic people cannot correct such horrible things to their women
And whenever you try to help them, it's impossible.
For example I started a place for the women who are left out in world alone
Who all like orphans
Who have children
and was surprised most of their are muslims
They had 8-10 children each
So now we need make an orphanage also
This is what they're producing from there religion
You can see this around, even Hindus have a funny system of widowhood.
If they make woman widows it's terrible and there are poor things some
or quite lot them who're living in Vrindavan
I was told that get one rupee per day
And what do the sing bhajans? In one rupee how can we live
in this country. They are good at creating so many beggars and beggar women, if that
is the religion better not have it." He has had enough of all kinds ritualisms through
these Brahminism's. These Brahmins were absolutely for nothing those who try to
teach religion as something great level . So in Sahaja Yoga you give up everything
Because this is all nothing but mud and in the mud you'll be finished.
You have to tell people about it, what are they going
do?
They've misused their religion for
all kinds of bad things, like in England if somebody dies they must have champagne. When
there go for the burial – They Must Have Champagne. How is it that going to have
champagne? And how out religion you say… All their priests also drink. No question!
One priest came to Sahaja Yoga and I was very happy but she said,"I'll come to
of drinking. I said, why? Because it's written in the Bible that he was drinker. I didn't
know! How could Christ say you should drink?" He was not only a Realizer but he was Realization
himself and they said,"He has said." Whatever we were saying, he had said it. Where?
said he went to one wedding, all right? In that wedding He made wine for the people.
But they did not!
And in such a short time
just put His hand into water
and it started tasting like grape juice
And grape juice has the same word wine in Hebrew language.
I said, ''I can do that.''
That doesn't mean i like people to drink.
Who could say such a nonsense?
It is awareness which important.
Chetana it's important and if you spoil your awareness how
It was impossible to tell them that you cannot drink, but drinking even in India has become
very common.
It is all against Christianity it's against Hinduism again Islam and though its written
down in Koran don't read the date they are drinker instead of following a religion
they have become the greatest, enough. Is that what Christ wanted them to do? You
had be pure people – nirmala tatvam you must have! That's
What it is also I told a story about Shadi Vahana who met
Christ in Kashmir and he asked Christ about His name
and his country he says, I come from a country where people are malich. Malich means those
have desire for mullahs fulfilled so He told him why don't you go and teach them nirmala
tatva shall we on earth? That is what Nirmal Tatvam You've got which purifies it cleanses
which gives you joy, happiness and the truth.
This is what we should ask for otherwise it's all darkness
– You don't see light whether you are Christian or Hindu
Muslim anyone…you cannot see Light of Truth
And have to take the Light of Truth but after that
What you have to do? You've got give it others.
We are to transform other's, we're work very hard for that
and sometimes I'm surprised how people
who doing such a good work
as so humble
or is so good
How they achieved this
I can't understand
Of course there some
Who money oriented
Who power orientated
But these things do not give joy.
What gives you joy is your inner light of truth,
which all have as we know.
We've experienced it but I would say
this experience has to be given others
It's only for You
Given by so many people possible
But how many do that? How may people
we have also Sikh community.
They came to Sahaj but they said,
We cannot worship Goddesses and I said why?
What is happening because Shri Guru Nanak
has talked about the goddess
The Devi
First sentence of his book
is Adya
Adya is Adishakti
And for this, if the Sikhs stupidly say that why do they have a Chandigarh?
They are so stupid also. Nothing to really compare!
Now you've got understand
Have You given up all those nonsense or not in your life
Or Are we sticking on too same
That is very important
As long as you're sticking onto the same
There will be problem
Sahaja Yoga does so much.
I was surprised, in America there are 300 sahajogis nothing happened to them – somewhere
on the tower ,somewhere along those streets all of then were there and nothing has happen
. Some have said that somebody told us inside that run away and we started running in
I don't know how all these three hundreds, but such a devil of the people who are thinking
about destroying whole world or coming around.
This is reason why went to America and told them that this war will be over before Diwali
ended – before Diwali it would have been over when it had ended!
What a stupid thing to think they can destroy the creation of God like this.
Who are They?
How have got The right, To destroy
the world but that is what is human nonsense
Christ came on This earth
He worked for A long time
and he was to be crucified
so He got crucified
crucifixion is not our glory. Our glory in His resurrection, that He was resurrected
no doubt to say it's possible and all of this who are you? What do know about spirituality
what can happen with a person spiritually equipped
What can work out in you?
Whatever we know about human beings,
We try to draw conclusions which are all wrong.
See! In your life there're so many miracles
of the lives of Sahaja Yogis
and I told somebody that
You better compile them
So he said within one month
All those letters have come upto my head
in one month. I said forget it, don't write! It's not 1 or 2 from all over the world people
are writing but those who have intellectuals of very difficult is impossible to put this
into their heads so whatever possible we had do our maximum. Put your attention
to people who want it. Now in India,
It has gone into jigs
,it's going
schools and everywhere
And somebody told me the other day
that even in a catholic church
they have started taking to Sahaja Yoga
I don't know
what is wrong with their heads
how do you manage
But thats out
Sahaj yoga is spreading
but it has to spread much more. You have, all of you individually should go round and work
out about this and talk about that. But Sahaja Yogis are little shy! Once I was going by
playing one lady who is very hot so i asked her what guru she follows? She told me the
name...I was surprised because she didn't know anything about spirituality and these
have huge houses and big temples, everything. And she was telling me the praise of her guru.
I thought that She is very shameless – She hasn't got anything in Her! She's so
very hot…and She's talking about Him but Sahaja Yogis won't talk about Him.
But I was surprised why Sahajogis don' t talk about Him?
But the other day I had gone with somebody in a market and I had a sahaja yogi with him.
And was surprised, he started telling them about Me
–and He gave them realization that they were very happy about it!
Everywhere you go to have neighbors or markets
everywhere should talk like they sing carols
We should also have bhajans and things to tell other people we have to do.
Why are you so shy?
This shyness is not going help Sahaja Yoga.
So please see that if try give realizations for others,
You'll have power ,have faith in yourself
I think they lack in faith or whatever it
very few people who come out and do it. Italy I have seen, also Austria, Australia, Sahaja
Yoga has spread a lot because of their conviction that we need to give others what
we have, you've to share it from the life of Christ.
One has understand a sacrifice so such lot of sacrifices to be crucified like that with
thieves but he did in same way when all people want to do sahaja yoga work they shouldn't
everything, what will happen to my grandfather? What would happened
To My grandmother?" I mean whatever letters
i get all about this. It's very funny they are only worried
About some relations They're not worried
about the relationships All over
The world you have. Worried
About a wife or children
I get only letters like this.
Nobody writes to Me that you have given realizations for so many people, they never write how
there has been able achieve spreading of Sahaja Yoga – no one writes it!
Very surprising.
You've got tell me…
I hope you all people understand the importers of spreading Sahaja Yoga.
If don't do that, we are absolutely useless!
The greatest thing for Me as You have so many lights here
We should be having more Sahaj Yogis around the world
if want to change this world and avoid
all the trials and tribulations of useless life they are leading, you have to save them.
You've got to salvage that's your job ,that what we're going pay for Sahaja Yoga not
not for yourself, don't get worried about your self. If you read the letters I give
will get disgusted – another kind of letter that they want to marry! All right? There
are many girls who claim we have been applying for four years and couldn' t get married
First thing must know is out-of proportion women are there. They're very good. Say
If there are forty boys, there would be at least hundred twenty or maybe one-hundred
fifty girls.
So now whom should we marry those girls?
Just think of it!
But they write letters of complaint that – We have applied four times…
…we can't help with this so you go outside and get married anywhere where
Or else you wait and see, and dedicate your life to Sahaja Yoga.
It's a very difficult thing when they go on complaining that I should be married
And haven't got married yet.
Marriage was never our idea but then we had
To allow marriages
Now it has become the main issue with everyone
Either They are not married
If they are married, then not happy.
Is there divorce?
They must be married again."
All sorts of things and complications for which I am not prepared.
Sahaja Yoga is NOT for that!
if your marriage isn't successful it's not my job
And if goes on we'll have to stop marriages
i don' want you write all these thing to me
It shows how poor you're in sahaj yoga
Why not write to Me how many people you have given Realization?
That will make me happy.
Instead of complaining about your wife and others, that's not My concern!
As it came we are married You
if We cannot carry on It is Your duty
And this what is the snack of Sahaja Yoga
In every religious movement there I've been so many wronged
While in Sahaja Yoga, I think marriages is a very big hurdle.
Moreover boys don't come because
In India it's really easy to marry boys
you can also get money and this that
but girls there are five times more than the boy
Boys do not want marriage
they will have their own marriages
though They aren´t perfect
So i cant understand why
In Sahaja Yoga also, after coming to Realization, to them marriage is a very important thing.
What it's most important that how many people you give realization?
That is your life!
If the lotus there will open but must give fragrance even if the Lotus has a responsibility
then what about you?
I am not saying get crucified like Christ no.
I said, you enjoy your life.
You have peace and stability balance but at the same time
You have to spread Sahaja Yoga.
This is what your job now,
Your Job Is not important
only this is important how many people you give realization
It's very difficult
because they've made a mess of all the great incarnations
All those great Sufis and saints
but at least you don't do that
So please try to think whom can you give Realization,
the Whom You Can Talk About Sahaja Yoga.
We have spread out and next time I hope
hear from you how many people we've given Realization
That is a greatest justification
for the crucifixion of Christ
For His birth
or coming on this earth is Agnya
And if they gave Realization
they have crossed Agnya, they've gone beyond and there are in Sahasrara.
So In Sahaja Yoga you understand everything it's very easy to
Understand. Sahaj yoga is the simplest thing
To understand but after Realization so
You Have go round
And see how many people
Can give realization
Everything Is alright
All your worshiping
all right, your puja is alright. But what's most important thing how many people you have
given realization? I would like to know that especially with ladies are rather weak in
giving realizations they can do a lot and afterall i am also woman but somehow find
the ladies in Sahaja Yoga are not of a level. They can do a lot, but somehow they don't
understand importance to their life – you're very important! How many people there
have got Realization? There were so many Sufis who got Realization and they write
finished. There were so many saints who did, wrote so much things in India we had so many
saints they wrote all these things people will read them but nothing happened you
have the art of giving realization . You know about Kundalini ,you know it go ahead
and talk to people. I was alone when i started Sahaja Yoga and am a woman, so what about
you? That's an out challenge for all of us how many have we made sahajogis even in
your family are not sahajoghis ,your daughter is not or son if not . So whats the use
of singing glory to Christ. If you are singing glory to Him,
You must make people cross their Akyas!
He is so highly placed within us
but we have never respected him
that such a highly-placed personality
you've crossed over
So why not others?
Let's see from todays puja
how much determination do I have
You should know that a Goddess doesn't come with your own demands.
She comes on her own, she has Her own timing but if you are people in majority who have
really become saints and making others saintly then I am for Your sake otherwise
I am available to you. You can have My vibrations, you can have my pujas – all these things
are permitted no doubt but for that your only capable…you're only entitled
for that, if you are doing Sahaja Yoga. If your spreading Sahaj yoga and giving to others
then only will be considered really capable of receiving the vibrations from the God
and in some countries it is so much powerful why not with your country? With your neighborhood
with your friends, which are relations it's possible but today you have to decide that
You're going dedicate yourself in giving into others. It is very joy-giving and talking
about Sahaja Yoga may God bless you!
Namah Paramadha Pataye, namaste astu lambodharayai kadantaya, vijnanashine shivasutāya, śrīvartamurta
Shri Nirmala Tevye Dhamo
Jage Tarka Janma
Jage Tarka Salah
Tarka Janma
Tarka Janma
Rupa Vaibha
Andhya Alam Kekas
I am married ladies from outside India, less from foreigners.
